mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, name, email, phone, status, login_fail_count, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, username, password, name, email, phone, status, login_fail_count, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, name, email, phone, status, login_fail_count, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( username, password, name, email, phone, status, login_fail_count, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status}, 0, NULL, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
name = #{name}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, status = #{status},
password = #{password},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, role_name, description FROM roles ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT role_id FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY role_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_roles (user_id, role_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, NOW())
